doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document claims paralegals can assist with emergency filings without pre-filing attorney review and waive unauthorized practice liability, which contradicts California's established regulatory requirements under Business & Professions C
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contains plausible elements but includes legally implausible provisions (paralegals drafting and assisting with filings without pre-filing attorney review, waiving unauthorized practice liability) that contradict California's established regulatory framework and would face significant Bar opposition.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document claims paralegals can assist with emergency filings without pre-filing attorney review and waive unauthorized practice liability, which contradicts California's established regulatory requirements under Business & Professions Code §6125 and would require formal Bar rulemaking rather than a Trust Fund Commission protocol.
